definitions.long: Place and move wave sources to shape glowing sand patterns.

settingsFields.description: Chooses the raw WebGL render path.

settingsFields.description: Controls wave phase speed: shorter is faster, longer is slower.
settingsFields.label: Wave Period

settingsFields.description: Controls the apparent GPU sand budget in the WebGL2 plate.
settingsFields.label: Particle Count

settingsFields.description: Fine-tunes how tightly GPU sand grains pack around resonance lines.
settingsFields.label: Particle Density

settingsFields.description: Caps how many placed resonance sources the WebGL2 plate can hold.
settingsFields.label: Source Limit

settingsFields.description: Narrows or softens the Chladni nodal bands in the raw shader.
settingsFields.label: Line Sharpness

settingsFields.description: Boosts the bloom-like energy halo around resonant sand ridges.
settingsFields.label: Glow

definitions.long: Add debris, pull it with gravity, and launch asteroids around a planet.

modes.label: Add

modes.description: Drag debris around.

definitions.name: Space Debris

settingsFields.description: Final visible debris opacity. Set to 0 to show only accumulated trails.
settingsFields.label: Debris Opacity

settingsFields.description: Adds a static high-density background star layer.
settingsFields.label: Star Field

settingsFields.description: Opacity of the static background star field.
settingsFields.label: Star Opacity

settingsFields.description: Radius of the area where newly emitted debris is scattered.
settingsFields.label: Add Radius

settingsFields.description: How strongly newly emitted debris inherits pointer/emitter movement.
settingsFields.label: Motion Inheritance

settingsFields.description: Random velocity variation applied to each newly emitted debris particle.
settingsFields.label: Add Jitter

settingsFields.description: Radius of the gravity well input field.
settingsFields.label: Well Size

settingsFields.description: Attraction strength while the gravity well is held.
settingsFields.label: Well Pull

settingsFields.description: Upper placement limit for secondary bodies. Each body picks a distinct orbit inside this radius while staying outside the planet.
settingsFields.label: Max Body Orbit

settingsFields.description: Multiplier for the stable circular orbit speed.
settingsFields.label: Body Speed

settingsFields.description: Particle state texture edge. Particle count equals edge x edge; higher values create denser orbital dust.
settingsFields.label: Debris Density

settingsFields.description: Velocity clamp used to keep dense orbital fields stable.
settingsFields.label: Velocity Limit

settingsFields.description: Additive glow multiplier for debris and trails.
settingsFields.label: Glow Strength

settingsFields.description: Velocity-aligned debris streak multiplier.
settingsFields.label: Streak Length

definitions.short: Add debris and bend it around a planet.

stagnationPolicy.reason: Recover when the ring loses velocity, radial variation, or visible dust trails.

caveats: Adapts Haxiomic GPU Fluid Experiments into GLGameLab raw WebGL2 with the source-like GPU velocity and particle split, plus a CPU compatibility fallback when float render targets are unavailable.

definitions.long: Stir a glowing cloud of particles and watch the current flow.
definitions.name: Particle Fluid

settingsFields.description: Maximum live particle count. Higher powers of two produce denser fluid and larger GPU particle textures.
settingsFields.label: Particle Budget

settingsFields.description: Source-style fluid texture divisor. 4 matches the original Medium quality; 1 is extreme GPU detail; higher values trade fidelity for speed.
settingsFields.label: Fluid Scale

settingsFields.description: Scales the simulated tank while keeping the screen bounds fixed. Lower values make the same viewport feel like a smaller, faster tank; higher values make currents broader/slower.
settingsFields.label: Tank Scale

settingsFields.description: Source grid cell scale used by advection, pressure projection, and particle flow scaling.
settingsFields.label: Cell Size

settingsFields.description: Source MouseForce damping constant. Lower values make currents fade faster.
settingsFields.label: Velocity Decay

settingsFields.description: Source particle velocity coupling. 1 tracks the flow field exactly.
settingsFields.label: Particle Drag

settingsFields.description: Source mouse-force radius in simulation space.
settingsFields.label: Force Radius

settingsFields.description: Source line-segment taper. 0.6 matches the reference shader.
settingsFields.label: Force Taper

settingsFields.description: Multiplier on the source mouse target velocity. 1 matches the reference.
settingsFields.label: Force Strength

settingsFields.description: Source particle point size is 1.
settingsFields.label: Point Size

settingsFields.description: Enhanced style particle-only brightness on fast turbulent points.
settingsFields.label: Bloom Strength

settingsFields.description: Enhanced style particle-only pulse along the active input stroke.
settingsFields.label: Gradient Pulse

settingsFields.description: Source motion-color speed scale. 4 matches the reference shader.
settingsFields.label: Color Speed Scale

definitions.short: Stir a glowing cloud of fluid-like particles.

stagnationPolicy.reason: Recover by reseeding the particle field when motion collapses.

caveats: The visible lava surface is a shared screen-space liquid renderer fed by live CPU particle/metaball state, so the shader is a render layer rather than the simulation source of truth.

caveats: Inspired by Eric Arnebäck's MIT-licensed gl-water2d project: https://github.com/Erkaman/gl-water2d. Current stable path uses CPU spatial hashing with GPU rendering; the GPU neighbor-grid solver is being kept experimental until it matches the reference behavior.

caveats: Inspired by matsuoka-601/Splash, https://github.com/matsuoka-601/Splash. Basic renders particles only, enhanced renders the shared compact liquid surface, and ultra enables the foam-density treatment. This is an original 2D raw WebGL2 adaptation of the MLS-MPM and screen-space fluid rendering ideas, not copied WebGPU/WGSL source.

settingsFields.description: Average GPU particle budget. Each burst rolls a size and derives its particle count from that size.
settingsFields.label: Burst Particle Budget

settingsFields.description: Scales child burst particle count and power per generation.
settingsFields.label: Secondary Size

settingsFields.description: Varies spark size per particle from the packed GPU particle seed. Values above 1 exaggerate the spread.
settingsFields.label: Size Variability

settingsFields.description: Resident GPU particle pool size. Use Burst Particle Budget to influence emitted particles.
settingsFields.label: GPU Particle Capacity

caveats: Contact emission is CPU-scheduled; spark motion, lifespan, bounce response, secondary bounce bursts, trails, and rendering are GPU-resident.

gestureMap.drag: emit continuously or draw a rail in Build mode

definitions.long: Create bright sparks with welding, pinwheel, or downward shower emitters, then build rails for them to bounce from.

modes.description: Press or drag to make sparks.
modes.label: Welding

modes.description: Emit sparks in a rotating tangential pattern.
modes.label: Pinwheel

modes.description: Emit downward-only sparks without inherited input velocity.
modes.label: Shower

modes.description: Tap for a short rail or drag to draw a rail.
modes.label: Build

definitions.name: Sparks

settingsFields.description: Controls how often emitter contacts emit spark bursts. Burst Density controls how many sparks are in each burst.
settingsFields.label: Burst Rate

settingsFields.description: Controls sparks per burst and white-hot core intensity at the emitter contact. Burst Rate controls cadence.
settingsFields.label: Burst Density

settingsFields.description: Varies the initial direction of emitted sparks.
settingsFields.label: Direction Chaos

settingsFields.description: Adds a random plus-or-minus position offset to each white-hot core flash from the welding torch.
settingsFields.label: Torch Position Variability

settingsFields.description: Removes this fraction of a spark remaining lifespan each time it bounces. Zero disables extra bounce aging; one expires on bounce.
settingsFields.label: Bounce Life Decay

settingsFields.description: Chance that a bounced spark emits a secondary burst into available GPU particle slots.
settingsFields.label: Bounce Burst Chance

settingsFields.description: Bounces below this impact speed do not emit secondary sparks. Above it, burst count and child speed ramp with impact speed.
settingsFields.label: Bounce Burst Min Speed

settingsFields.description: Controls how many secondary spark slots try to respawn from each marked bounce.
settingsFields.label: Bounce Burst Count

settingsFields.description: Scales the number of secondary sparks upward as the parent spark hits faster. Zero keeps bounce burst count fixed.
settingsFields.label: Bounce Count Speed Scale

settingsFields.description: Scales secondary burst launch speed upward from the parent spark impact speed. Zero keeps speed based only on the Bounce particle profile.
settingsFields.label: Bounce Impact Speed Scale

settingsFields.description: Widens a randomized fan centered on the reflected direction, from a focused ray at zero to 180 degrees at three.
settingsFields.label: Bounce Burst Spread

settingsFields.description: Adds coherent in-flight directional turbulence without applying drag.
settingsFields.label: Turbulence

settingsFields.description: White-hot source flash particles. Controls how often this profile emits or flashes.
settingsFields.label: Rate

settingsFields.description: White-hot source flash particles. Scales this particle profile without changing other spark families.
settingsFields.label: Size

settingsFields.description: White-hot source flash particles. Varies size per particle from the packed GPU particle seed.
settingsFields.label: Size Variability

settingsFields.description: White-hot source flash particles. Scales how long this particle profile survives before fading out.
settingsFields.label: Lifespan

settingsFields.description: White-hot source flash particles. Varies this profile lifetime from particle to particle.
settingsFields.label: Lifespan Variability

settingsFields.description: White-hot source flash particles. Scales this profile brightness without changing particle size.
settingsFields.label: Intensity

settingsFields.description: White-hot source flash particles. Controls how long this profile leaves a hot glow after ignition.
settingsFields.label: Afterglow

settingsFields.description: Primary emitted sparks. Scales this particle profile without changing other spark families.
settingsFields.label: Size

settingsFields.description: Primary emitted sparks. Varies size per particle from the packed GPU particle seed.
settingsFields.label: Size Variability

settingsFields.description: Primary emitted sparks. Controls how elongated this particle profile renders in point and trail passes.
settingsFields.label: Length

settingsFields.description: Primary emitted sparks. Varies rendered spark length per particle without changing size.
settingsFields.label: Length Variability

settingsFields.description: Primary emitted sparks. Scales how long this particle profile survives before fading out.
settingsFields.label: Lifespan

settingsFields.description: Primary emitted sparks. Varies this profile lifetime from particle to particle.
settingsFields.label: Lifespan Variability

settingsFields.description: Primary emitted sparks. Scales this particle profile speed from the scene emitter power.
settingsFields.label: Speed Scale

settingsFields.description: Secondary sparks spawned from primary spark bounces. Scales this particle profile without changing other spark families.
settingsFields.label: Size

settingsFields.description: Secondary sparks spawned from primary spark bounces. Varies size per particle from the packed GPU particle seed.
settingsFields.label: Size Variability

settingsFields.description: Secondary sparks spawned from primary spark bounces. Controls how elongated this particle profile renders in point and trail passes.
settingsFields.label: Length

settingsFields.description: Secondary sparks spawned from primary spark bounces. Varies rendered spark length per particle without changing size.
settingsFields.label: Length Variability

settingsFields.description: Secondary sparks spawned from primary spark bounces. Scales how long this particle profile survives before fading out.
settingsFields.label: Lifespan

settingsFields.description: Secondary sparks spawned from primary spark bounces. Varies this profile lifetime from particle to particle.
settingsFields.label: Lifespan Variability

settingsFields.description: Secondary sparks spawned from primary spark bounces. Scales this particle profile speed from the scene emitter power.
settingsFields.label: Speed Scale

settingsFields.description: Secondary sparks spawned from primary spark bounces. Randomly scales each particle speed around its profile speed.
settingsFields.label: Speed Variability

settingsFields.description: Optional pseudo-depth variation for spark scale and collision radius.
settingsFields.label: Simulation Depth

settingsFields.description: Ultra-only feedback persistence for accumulated spark trails.
settingsFields.label: Trail Persistence

settingsFields.description: Draws swept spark segments between frames so fast sparks read as continuous streaks instead of dotted stamps.
settingsFields.label: Trail Continuity

settingsFields.description: Ultra-only bloom applied during persistent trail compositing.
settingsFields.label: Bloom Strength

settingsFields.description: Resident GPU particle pool size. Higher values allow dense welding bursts and long-lived bounce trails.
settingsFields.label: GPU Particle Capacity

definitions.short: Create bright sparks that bounce off rails.

stagnationPolicy.reason: Recover if no welding contact, queued sparks, or trail energy remain during demo mode.

styles.description: Cold cyan plasma with pale green secondary shards.
styles.name: Plasma Cyan

styles.description: Bright forge sparks that cool through amber and red.
styles.name: Molten Gold

styles.description: Bleached white ignition with sharp lemon-yellow hot flecks.
styles.name: Magnesium Flare

styles.description: Rust red and toxic green industrial sparks over a black bench.
styles.name: Oxide Rain

tutorialPages.body: Press for one burst or drag over the bench to keep the contact point active.
tutorialPages.title: Welding Mode

tutorialPages.body: Switch to Pinwheel for rotating tangential spark sprays from the contact point.
tutorialPages.title: Pinwheel Mode

tutorialPages.body: Switch to Shower for downward-only sparks that ignore pointer velocity.
tutorialPages.title: Shower Mode

tutorialPages.body: Switch to Build and draw simple rails for sparks to ricochet from.
tutorialPages.title: Build Rails

tutorialPages.body: Spark state lives in GPU textures and renders through Basic, Enhanced, and Ultra pipelines.
tutorialPages.title: Raw Spark Engine

caveats: Simulation state lives in GPU framebuffer textures; WebGL2 float render-target support is required for the high-resolution path.

gestureMap.drag: paint or erase along your path
gestureMap.tap: apply Paint or Erase at the pointer

definitions.long: Paint and erase pigment to grow spots, stripes, and scars.

modes.description: Add pigment to the surface.
modes.label: Paint

modes.description: Cut holes in the pattern.
modes.label: Erase

definitions.name: Turing Skin
definitions.short: Paint pigment that grows into spots and stripes.

stagnationPolicy.reason: Recover when pigment variance or reaction energy collapses.

styles.description: Warm activator spots over ink-dark chemistry.
styles.name: Leopard Gold

styles.description: Cold monochrome bands with spectral edges.
styles.name: Zebra Ghost

styles.description: Reef-pink morphogens blooming through teal inhibitor.
styles.name: Coral Morph

styles.description: Black morphogen skin on a light laboratory plate.
styles.name: Ink Paper

styles.description: Blue, gold, and black amphibian warning colors.
styles.name: Poison Dart

styles.description: Soft rose morphogens over deep sea violet.
styles.name: Manta Rose

styles.description: Olive, chartreuse, and bone tones for organic maps.
styles.name: Lichen Map

styles.description: False-color heat skin with red-yellow boundaries.
styles.name: Thermal Hide

styles.description: Pale fur fields with smoky charcoal pigment.
styles.name: Snow Leopard

styles.description: Aquatic tiger stripes in teal, orange, and pearl.
styles.name: Reef Tiger

tutorialPages.body: Tap or drag in Paint mode to seed pigment. The reaction spreads it into spots or bands over time.
tutorialPages.title: Paint Pigment

tutorialPages.body: Switch to Erase to cut holes, scars, and negative space into the pattern.
tutorialPages.title: Carve Holes

caveats: Sparse graph topology remains CPU-side by design; dense vessel rendering and glow are GPU-instanced with no per-frame field texture upload.

gestureMap.drag: paint the active vascular tool along your path
gestureMap.tap: apply Guide, Feed, or Prune at the pointer

definitions.long: Guide branching vessels, feed them, or prune them back.

modes.description: Move the guide point for new growth.
modes.label: Guide

modes.description: Thicken nearby vessels.
modes.label: Feed

modes.description: Trim nearby branch tips.
modes.label: Prune

definitions.name: Alien Vascular Tree
definitions.short: Guide branching vessels as they grow and thicken.

stagnationPolicy.reason: Recover when active tips, nutrient variance, or growth energy collapse.

styles.description: Pink vascular tissue with cyan nutrient pulses.
styles.name: Coral Veins

styles.description: Electric green roots over blue-black tissue.
styles.name: Neon Roots

styles.description: Golden canopy and amber nutrient glow.
styles.name: Gold Arbor

styles.description: Deep crimson vessels with oxygen-bright highlights.
styles.name: Arterial Red

styles.description: Acid lymph greens against violet alien tissue.
styles.name: Xeno Lymph

styles.description: Frozen blue capillaries with white nutrient sparks.
styles.name: Ice Capillary

styles.description: Ochre, moss, and cream vessels through dark substrate.
styles.name: Fungal Artery

styles.description: Laboratory magenta and cyan transport channels.
styles.name: Synthetic Plasma

styles.description: UV purple vessels with hot green nutrient glow.
styles.name: Blacklight Vines

styles.description: Warm marrow reds and bone-white transport branches.
styles.name: Bone Marrow

tutorialPages.body: Move the guide light to bias where new vessels grow.
tutorialPages.title: Guide Growth

tutorialPages.body: Feed local vessels to reactivate tips and thicken successful branches.
tutorialPages.title: Feed Tissue

tutorialPages.body: Switch to Prune and tap or drag over branch tips to trim them back.
tutorialPages.title: Prune Tips
